MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WENDY'S INTERNATIONAL, INC.'S Motion For Change Of Venue (TO COUNTY OF SACRAMENTO).
APPEARANCE: Scott Kalkin, Esq. of Roboostoff & Kalkin 732-0282 for pltf & opposing party; Gregory G. Iskander, Esq. of Duane Morris LLP 957-3059 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission. Plaintiff submitted a proposed order. (Court's tentative ruling was to deny defendant's motion.
